Fields.Name: Rider - Character ID
Fields.Description: It is a parameter that identifies the character of the riding side when riding.

Fields.Name: Mount - Character ID
Fields.Description: It is a parameter that identifies the character of the riding side when riding.

Fields.Name: Ride - Camera Param ID
Fields.Description: It is a parameter to change the camera parameter at the time of riding to a dedicated camera. It is a parameter for PC only, and it does not work even if it is set to the enemy.

Fields.Name: Rider - Character Animation ID
Fields.Description: It is a parameter to rewrite the value of variable RideOnAnimId set in RideOn (playback during riding) state of the tool HavokAnimationTool (HAT) that controls character animation playback.

Fields.Name: Mount - Character Animation ID
Fields.Description: It is a parameter to rewrite the value of variable RiddenOnAnimId set in RiddenOn (playback when riding) state of the tool HavokAnimationTool (HAT) that controls character animation playback.

Fields.Name: Mount - Adjust Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: This is a Damipoli setting that is required only for the rider (the rider's character does not need to be set).

Fields.Name: Mount - Check Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: There is no need to set Damipoli for the character on the riding side.

Fields.Name: Rider/Mount - Ride Angle Tolerance
Fields.Description: Judgment is made by the angle difference between the [direction] on the riding side and the front judgment Damipoly ID on the riding side. The higher the value, the more you can ride even if you are facing away.

Fields.Name: Mount Distance
Fields.Description: It is a parameter that determines the mountable distance to the target

Fields.Name: Mount Distance - Max Height
Fields.Description: Is it possible to ride even if the target to be ridden is above the target to be ridden? Is set in meters

Fields.Name: Mount Distance - Min Height
Fields.Description: Is it possible to ride even if the target to be ridden is below the target to be ridden? Is set in meters

Fields.Name: Ride Angle Tolerance - Min
Fields.Description: In what range (angle) of the rider can ride? Set the minimum value of

Fields.Name: Ride Angle Tolerance - Max
Fields.Description: In what range (angle) of the rider can ride? Set the maximum value of
